implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0

completion_promises.evidence: build_app_state in src/jarvis/infrastructure/lifecycle.py constructs LlamaSwapAdapter(base_url=config.llama_swap_base_url) at step 5 (line ~331) and stores it on the returned AppState. Verified by TestAC001LlamaSwapAdapterConstruction (2 tests pass).

completion_promises.criterion_text: startup calls async_subagents = build_async_subagents(config) and threads it into build_supervisor(..., async_subagents=async_subagents, ...).
completion_promises.evidence: build_app_state imports build_async_subagents from jarvis.agents.subagent_registry, calls it at step 7 (line ~358), and passes the result via async_subagents= kwarg into build_supervisor. Verified by TestAC002AsyncSubagentsThreadedThroughBuildSupervisor (2 tests pass).

completion_promises.criterion_text: startup assembles attended AND ambient tool lists via assemble_tool_list(...) with include_frontier=True / False respectively, and passes ambient_tool_factory=lambda: tool_list_ambient into build_supervisor.
completion_promises.evidence: Steps 8 + 9 of build_app_state call assemble_tool_list(config, capability_registry, include_frontier=True) for the attended 10-tool surface and again with include_frontier=False for the ambient 9-tool surface. Step 10 passes ambient_tool_factory=lambda: tool_list_ambient into build_supervisor. Verified by TestAC003AttendedAndAmbientToolListsAssembled (3 tests pass) and the updated TestAC005LifecycleWiring::test_assemble_tool_list_called_with_config_and_registry in test_supervisor_lifecycle_wiring.py.

completion_promises.criterion_text: OPENAI_BASE_URL environment variable is set to <config.llama_swap_base_url>/v1 before build_async_subagents runs (graph compilation reads this).
completion_promises.evidence: Step 6 of build_app_state writes os.environ['OPENAI_BASE_URL'] = f'{config.llama_swap_base_url}/v1' BEFORE step 7 calls build_async_subagents. Verified by TestAC004OpenAIBaseUrlEnvVarSetBeforeAsyncSubagents (2 tests pass): one reads the env var post-startup, the other captures the env value inside a side_effect on build_async_subagents to prove ordering.

completion_promises.criterion_text: AppState is extended to carry llamaswap_adapter: LlamaSwapAdapter for later use by the supervisor's swap-aware policy.
completion_promises.evidence: AppState dataclass in src/jarvis/infrastructure/lifecycle.py adds 'llamaswap_adapter: LlamaSwapAdapter | None = None' as a declared field. The default is None so existing direct AppState() constructions in tests are unaffected; build_app_state always populates it. Verified by TestAC005AppStateCarriesLlamaSwapAdapter (2 tests pass).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Swap-aware voice-ack policy: helper function should_emit_voice_ack(adapter_id: str, swap_status: SwapStatus) -> bool returns True iff adapter_id in {'reachy'} (or voice-reactive set from config) AND swap_status.eta_seconds > 30. Boundary behaviour: eta 0 → False; 30 → False; 31 → True; 240 → True.
completion_promises.evidence: should_emit_voice_ack in src/jarvis/infrastructure/lifecycle.py uses VOICE_ACK_ETA_THRESHOLD_SECONDS=30 and DEFAULT_VOICE_REACTIVE_ADAPTER_IDS=frozenset({'reachy'}); accepts an optional voice_reactive_adapters override. Verified by TestAC006ShouldEmitVoiceAckBoundaryTable parametrized tests covering ETA 0/30/31/240 boundary plus non-voice-reactive adapter and override cases (6 tests pass).

completion_promises.criterion_text: When should_emit_voice_ack returns True, the supervisor emits the TTS ack stub and queues the request for dispatch once the swap completes.
completion_promises.evidence: emit_voice_ack_and_queue helper returns a frozen VoiceAckOutcome dataclass with emitted=True/queued=True/ack_text=VOICE_ACK_TTS_TEXT when the policy fires; emitted=False/queued=False/ack_text=None otherwise. Logs voice_ack_emitted via structlog when firing. Verified by TestAC007EmitVoiceAckAndQueue (3 tests pass) covering the firing path, the below-threshold path, and the non-voice-reactive path.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Phase 1 + FEAT-J002 startup behaviour preserved: existing AppState fields unchanged; session_manager, store, capability_registry still wired as before.
completion_promises.evidence: AppState dataclass keeps all existing fields (config, supervisor, store, session_manager, capability_registry) at their original positions and types; only adds the new llamaswap_adapter field as the last entry with a None default for backward compatibility. The full FEAT-J002 lifecycle test suite (test_supervisor_lifecycle_wiring.py: 17 tests, test_supervisor_with_tools.py: 7 tests) all pass. Verified by TestAC008Phase1AndFeatJ002BehaviourPreserved (1 test pass).

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Ran `python -m ruff check` against src/jarvis/infrastructure/lifecycle.py, tests/test_lifecycle_startup_phase3.py, tests/test_supervisor_lifecycle_wiring.py, tests/test_import_graph.py — all checks passed. Ran `python -m ruff format` to apply formatting; final files are format-clean.
